title: Pre-Shift Check (Zoll X Series)
content_markdown:
#### Indications

- As a part of a normal pre-shift equipment and ambulance check.

#### Procedure

- Start ZOLL - ZOLL will perform Self-Test.

- Complete 30 Joule Test Shock: 
- Remove defib lead from grey connector and insert into test socket.
- Complete a 30J defibrillation via the test socket.
- Success message will appear.
- Press Home button to return to main screen.

- Test Connectivity to STEMI iPhone.

- Arrow across to Connectivity Icon.

- Arrow down and click on Update Distribution List

- The ZOLL will attempt to connect to the Network via the paired STEMI iPhone. The paired **STEMI iPhone** will show Personal Hotspot: 1 Connection ‘flashing’.

- Transmission Complete message indicates successful test.

#### Troubleshooting: Transmission Failure

- Transmission failed will flash reason for failure (i.e. STEMI Phone switched off, unpaired Personal Hotspot is switched off or no phone reception)

- Check STEMI iPhone / Settings for ZOLL transmission: 
- WiFi should be off, bluetooth on, personal hotspot on
